title: lichen_link_rx rx_ctx uses link_ctx.link_key pointer - needs cleanup serialization doc
description:
File: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:375-385

The rx_ctx.link_key is set to link_ctx.link_key pointer (line 379):
  .link_key = link_ctx.has_link_key ? link_ctx.link_key : NULL,

Currently safe: cleanup happens under both mutexes. But the pointer is captured into rx_ctx before lichen_link_rx() runs - if a maintainer moves cleanup outside mutex scope, the pointer could dangle.

Risk: Future refactor breaks the implicit invariant that cleanup is serialized with RX.

Mitigation: Add SECURITY comment at cleanup site documenting the serialization requirement, or copy link_key bytes (not pointer) into rx_ctx.
